positive: A hyper-detailed, minimalist line art illustration of a majestic sloth hanging peacefully from interconnected tropical vines and oversized monstera leaves. The sloth has a serene, smiling expression. The composition is centered and symmetrical, utilizing clean negative space and strong black line work against a single, vibrant accent color wash (teal and emerald). Style should emulate modern botanical sketch mixed with sophisticated tattoo art. Emphasize clean silhouettes and high contrast. Studio lighting, vector quality, isolated on a solid, creamy off-white background.
negative: low contrast, grayscale, photorealism, muddy, dirty, watermark, signature, text, logos, noise, artifacts, blur, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy background
